installCommand: if [ -f frontend/package-lock.json ]; then npm --prefix frontend ci; else npm ci; fi
buildCommand: rm -rf dist frontend/dist && if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=2048' npm --prefix frontend run build && cp -R frontend/dist dist; else NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=2048' npm run build; fi
